description_long: This object is a compact urban gas station complex featuring five distinct building units arranged in a row. Each unit has a flat roof, with some roofs displaying additional structures such as vents, signage, or small towers. One unit is topped with a tall, thin signpost and a lamp, while another displays a prominent 'GAS' sign. The buildings are set on rectangular bases, and the overall design is blocky and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements. The station appears to lack a large canopy, and the fueling area is not clearly demarcated. The color is uniformly dark, giving the station a monolithic appearance.
description: A row of five blocky, dark-colored gas station buildings with flat roofs, signage, and minimal decorative features. The station is compact, with no visible canopy or clear fueling area.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five building units, with visible signage, a lamp post, and rooftop details.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and alignment of the buildings, with rooftops and bases visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the buildings, with the 'GAS' sign and lamp post more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the narrow profile of the buildings and the alignment of their rooftops.
attribute_station_signage: One large 'GAS' sign is visible on the roof of the leftmost building, composed of block letters. No other signage or branding is apparent.
